name: Lambodhara Textiles Limited
summary: Lambodhara Textiles Limited manufactures and sells synthetic yarns in India and Internationally. The company operates through Textile, Wind Mills, and Real Estate segments. It offers slub yarns, multi count and multi twist yarns, siro yarns, and neppy yarns. The company also exports its products. In addition, it generates electricity through wind. Lambodhara Textiles Limited was founded in 1994 and is based in Coimbatore, India.
